entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns affecting the Sudano-Sahelian zone

entities.name: FOOD INSECURITY
entities.description: The state of being without reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: SUDANO-SAHELIAN ZONE OF MALI
entities.description: The specific geographic region in Mali where the study was conducted

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An integrated approach to managing landscapes to address food security and climate change

entities.name: CONTOUR BUNDING
entities.description: A soil and water conservation practice involving barriers along contours

entities.name: MICRODOSING
entities.description: The application of small, precise amounts of fertilizer to crops

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing two or more crops in proximity in the same field

entities.name: ZAÏ PITS
entities.description: Traditional planting pits used to harvest water and concentrate nutrients

entities.name: ADAPTED CROP VARIETY
entities.description: The use of crop varieties specifically selected or bred for local environmental conditions

entities.name: FOOD SELF-SUFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ability of smallholder households to meet their own food needs

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY TECHNOLOGY SELECTION METHOD
entities.description: A method involving farmers in the selection of agricultural technologies

entities.name: ON-FARM DEMONSTRATION
entities.description: The practical display of technology performance on actual farms

entities.name: LAND USE/LAND COVER
entities.description: The classification of the physical surface of the earth and its usage

entities.name: CROP YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area of land

entities.name: FARMERS' PRACTICE
entities.description: Traditional farming methods used by local farmers as a baseline

entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: A small-seeded grass grown as cereal for human or animal consumption

entities.name: FOOD PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total amount of food generated for consumption
